title: Kids Book Cafe & Reading Corner
shortDesc: A cozy cafe with a huge kids' reading corner — books, smoothies, and a calm family atmosphere.
description: The Kids Book Cafe is a hidden gem for families — a relaxed, air-conditioned cafe with an extensive collection of children's books in English and other languages. Kids can settle in with a book while parents enjoy great coffee. Regular story-time sessions are held on weekend mornings for toddlers and young readers. A perfect midday retreat from the heat with a genuinely calming atmosphere.
